package.config.altSolutionFolders.description: If there is no solution in the workplace root folder, it will search for solutions in any of these folders.
package.config.defaultMsBuildConfiguration.descr: Default value for the $(Configuration) MSBuild property used to evaluate Condition attributes when reading project files.
package.config.defaultMsBuildPlatform.descriptio: Default value for the $(Platform) MSBuild property used to evaluate Condition attributes when reading project files.
package.config.defaultMsBuildVersion.description: Value for the $(MSBuildVersion) reserved MSBuild property (this extension does not invoke an actual build engine, so this cannot be detected automatically).
package.config.itemNesting.description: Sets whether related items will be displayed nested
package.config.lineEndings.description: Controls line endings of solution and project files.
package.config.netcoreIgnore.description: Folder and filenames to ignore when get a dotnet core project content
package.config.nuget.codeActions.description: Sets whether to show NuGet package versions in the code actions.
package.config.nuget.codeCompletions.description: Sets whether to show NuGet package versions and names in the code completions.
package.config.nuget.codeDecorators.description: Sets whether to show NuGet package versions in the code.
package.config.nuget.includePrerelease.descripti: Sets whether to include prerelease packages when searching for NuGet packages.
package.config.openProjectInlineButtonShown.desc: Sets whether projects in the explorer tree include an inline button to open the underlying project file (i.e. the csproj or fsproj)
package.config.openProjectOnClick.description: Sets whether clicking a project in the explorer tree opens the underlying proj file (i.e. the csproj or fsproj)
package.config.openSolutions.inAltFolders.descri: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the altSolutionFolders parameter.
package.config.openSolutions.inFoldersAndSubfold: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the current opened folder and subfolders.
package.config.openSolutions.inRootFolder.descri: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the root folder.
package.config.openSolutions.inSettings.descript: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the 'dotnet.defaultSolution' parameter in the settings.json file.
package.config.openSolutions.selectedInOmnisharp: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the current selected solution in Omnisharp extension.
package.config.outputChannelMode.description: The solution explorer output channel mode: show on every single log, append but not show the pane or none
package.config.saveBeforeExecute.description: Save all open files before executing a terminal command (e.g. dotnet build, clean, test).
package.config.showMode.description: Show the solution explorer in the activity bar, in the explorer pane or don't show it.
package.config.showTerminalOnCommand.description: Show the terminal when a command is executed.
package.config.solutionExplorerIcons.description:
solution-explorer -> Uses the vscode-solution-explorer custom icons
mix -> use current theme icons for files and folders
current-theme -> Uses the installed icon theme
package.config.trackActiveItem.description: Select the active editor file in the solution explorer.
package.config.xmlClosingTagSpace.description: Add space at the end of XML closing tag, ex: " />"
package.config.xmlspaces.description: Spaces to be used for indenting XML output. It could be a number or an string. ex. "2", " " or "\t".
package.config.xxprojItemTypes.description: Type of XML element to put in the xxproj files.
package.view.slnbrw.name: Explorer
package.view.slnexpl.name: Solution
package.viewContainer.sln_explorer.title: Solution
package.viewsWelcome.slnbrw.contents:
No visual studio solution found [learn more](https://github.com/fernandoescolar/vscode-solution-explorer#open-solutions).
[Open solution](command:solutionExplorer.openSolution)
[Create New Solution](command:solutionExplorer.createNewSolution)
package.viewsWelcome.slnexpl.contents:
No visual studio solution found [learn more](https://github.com/fernandoescolar/vscode-solution-explorer#open-solutions).
[Open solution](command:solutionExplorer.openSolution)
[Create New Solution](command:solutionExplorer.createNewSolution)

runtime.Are you sure you want to move '{0}' over: Are you sure you want to move '{0}' overriding the existing file?
runtime.Are you sure you want to {0}?: Are you sure you want to {0}?
runtime.Select a project file to add: Select a project file to add
runtime.Template files already exist in {0}. Do: Template files already exist in {0}. Do you want to overwrite them?
runtime.The file {0} is out of the solution scop: The file {0} is out of the solution scope, do you want to create a copy?
runtime.The folder '{0}' is not opened in the wo: The folder '{0}' is not opened in the workspace, do you want to open it?
runtime.There is already a folder named '{0}': There is already a folder named '{0}'
runtime.These overrides only affect how Solution: These overrides only affect how Solution Explorer evaluates Condition/property values in this workspace - they aren't written to any project file.
